violations.text: - Ice scoop handle was observed in ice. - Ice scoop handle must be stored above or in another location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024

The pre-flush spray hose at the 3 bay sink is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 01/01/2025

The ice machine is lacking an air gap (currently has an air-break). A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/01/2025
- The door to bathroom is not self-closing. - Observed bathroom door next to food storage bins. - Per PIC a work order was placed. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024
Observed the grout in the back prep area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Grout to be redone. New Violation. Correct By: 01/01/2025
